commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Son of man, prophesy against the shepherds of Israel, prophesy, and say unto them, Thus says the Lord GOD unto the shepherds; Woe be to the shepherds of Israel that do feed themselves. should not the shepherds feed the flocks. That is, princes, magistrates, chief priests, and scribes. (Challoner) Shepherds may lawfully take milk, (1 Corinthians ix. ) but the sheep and its wool belong to the master. (Worthington) Excellent instructions are here given for all in authority.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
